version_description: All chord voicings included are as heard on the original recording.

versions.version_description: Please note: this song is played with a Capo on the first fret using the chords below to sound like the recorded album version. The progression is played throughout the entire song. I occasionally change the strum pattern between the two shown to add variation/maintain interest.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
* All Ebmaj7 and Dbmaj7 chords fall on the 1st beat (1) through out
** All Bb and Ab chords fall on the '&' of the 4th beat through out

[Intro]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  x2

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Lonely mother gazes out of a window[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Looking at a son that she just can't touch[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
If at any time he's in a jam she'll be by his side[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]
But he doesn't realize he hurts her so much[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
But all the praying just ain't helping at all[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]
'Cause he can't seem to keep himself out of trouble[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
So he goes out and he makes his money the best way he knows how[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]
Another body lying cold in the gutter[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes like you used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Little precious has a natural obsession[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Ab[/ch]
For temptation but he just can't see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
She gives him lovin' that his body can't handle[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]
All that he can say is baby is good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
One day he stops and takes a glimpse in the mirror[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Ab[/ch]
But he doesn't recognize his own face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
His health is failing and he doesn't know why[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]
Three letters took him to his final resting place[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes like you used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]


[Rap]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  x4


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes like you used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes like you used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
